title: LEGO 10327 Icons Dune Atreides Royal Ornithopter, Model Kit for Adults to Build, Movie-Themed Aviation Gifts for Men, Women, Him, Her, Vehicle Set with 8 Minifigures Inc. Chani & Baron Harkonnen
features: Building set for Dune movie fans – Collectible LEGO Icons Dune Atreides Royal Ornithopter model kit for adults to build featuring 8 minifigures
Movie Memorabilia – The LEGO replica of the Dune Atreides Royal Ornithopter features fold-out, flappable wings and deployable landing gear
Minifigure characters – Includes Paul Atreides, Lady Jessica, Gurney Halleck, Chani, Leto Atreides, Liet Kynes, Duncan Idaho and Baron Harkonnen
Displayable LEGO set for adults – This LEGO vehicle can be displayed in flight or landing modes making it a fun decoration for the home or office
With digital building instructions – The LEGO Builder app features a digital version of the building instructions included with this LEGO vehicle set

Mindful LEGO projects – This LEGO Icons project is part of a range of advanced LEGO sets for adults, and makes a great aviation-themed Christmas gift for men, women, him or her, or as a thoughtful anniversary present for a wife or husband
description: From the manufacturer Premium Dune replica model The Dune Atreides Royal Ornithopter has landed LEGO Icons Dune Atreides Royal Ornithopter building project for adults, complete with 8 iconic film characters. Impressive display model As featured in the 2021 Dune film Construct a detailed replica of the iconic Dune aircraft – perfect for display in the home or office. Previous page Posable replica model Fold back the wings to display the aircraft in landed mode. Just like the film Press a button to flap the aircraft’s wings. Deployable landing gear Turn a dial to lower and retract the craft’s landing gear. Tandem cockpit Features a side-hinged cockpit with room for 2 characters. Next page Dive into the details Build solo or with family and friends Discover a space for relaxation with the inspiring range of LEGO building sets (sold separately) designed specifically for adults. Previous page Iconic character lineup Paul Atreides and Lady Jessica. Iconic character lineup Gurney Halleck and Chani. Iconic character lineup Leto Atreides and Liet Kynes. Iconic character lineup Duncan Idaho and Baron Harkonnen in his long robe. Next page A film-themed gift idea The perfect gift for Dune film fans Indulge yourself or treat a loved one with this LEGO Icons Dune Atreides Royal Ornithopter building set for adults and Dune enthusiasts of all ages.
